description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish library that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have three jobs: check-javascript, test, and publish. The check-javascript job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Node.js 16.17.0, install frontend dependencies, lint JavaScript, and build the JavaScript bundle. The test job should use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10 on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and running tests with tox. The publish job should depend on the test job, run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Python 3.9, build artifacts, and publish a Python distribution to PyPI using a token from secrets.
